title: The World Reacts Before the Reverie
description: On pages 15–17, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Luffy as News of Whole Cake Island spreads across the world and the story pivots toward the Reverie.
scene: The world learns a distorted version of the Whole Cake Island incident as royal delegations move toward the Reverie.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Uh... Please don't call me a hero!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Woah... this guy is strong.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I imagined you to be a great big person, but you're just a good young man!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He won't even take credit for preventing the Torpedo from hitting us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Ah!! It's Luffy- San!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, I mean... straw hat Luffy is all over the newspaper!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Do you want to read it, Koby-san?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: No, no... well... um... uh...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is so cool... as expected, Luffy-san is... moving ahead one step at a time...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When I see you in the newspaper like this... I'm reminded of the events of that day....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, Captain Koby! What are you doing?! Come back to the ship already!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Roger!! We'll be arriving at New Marineford shortly!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We will follow close behind you and escort you there!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you... a fan of Lucy, Koby- Kun?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I bet you're a fan of Luffy- Land!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Grin grin

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: No!! He... he's an enemy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Let's have a chat about it.:D

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll keep it a secret, I promise. 🙂

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why was the bastard that interferred with my trade...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: In that old HAG's territory?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Zena Hahaha Ha...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: An Emperor...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's still too soon for you, straw hat....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The Victor!!!? HAAAAH!!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: When exactly did I loseee feel?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This news... He is definitely the one who did this, Mama!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: You better watch your back, more- no...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The one who should watch their back is you, straw haaaatt TTT!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...It looks like we'll be able to meet soon.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Luffy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Hm?...Wait a second....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy-san, this... you didn't see the extra zero?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Look... one hundred thousand, one million, ten million...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: YOUR BOUNTY...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Is JB 1.5 BILLION!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Eeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee eethhhhhhhh

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: The impact spreads across the seas!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As the world heads towards the reverie, this group heads towards the Wano Country...

summary: This section advances the Reverie Setup storyline with 40 dialogue beats. The aftermath becomes world news and the narrative shifts toward the Reverie and global politics.
